rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total_hits>=1 -> FAIL

results.note: source-domain Hokulea wiki; not an LLM mechanism
CoVe = draft -> independent verification questions -> revise; direct functional twin of independent-channel intermediate verification + patch
PRM step-wise validity labels; covers intermediate-step verification primitive
activation+attribution patching for reasoning steps; directly the partial-patch primitive on intermediate state
Focused CoT for efficient reasoning; intermediate-step optimization adjacent
Chain-of-X survey enumerates CoVe and verification variants of CoT
reasoning-chain quality factors; intermediate-state evaluation overlap
general-purpose CoT verification catches early (intermediate) mistakes; direct twin of midstream lightweight check

fail_reason: Independent cross-agent scoring confirms 7 hits. Chain-of-Verification (rank 2) is a direct functional twin: draft answer -> independent verification sub-questions -> revise. General-Purpose CoT Verification (rank 8) explicitly catches early/intermediate mistakes via problem-agnostic verification. Activation+attribution patching (rank 4) instantiates the partial-patch-on-intermediate-state primitive. PRM step-wise labels (rank 3), Chain-of-X survey (rank 6), Focused CoT (rank 5), and reasoning-chain quality (rank 7) all cover intermediate-state verification or correction. The Polynesian-voyaging analogy adds no LLM-side novelty beyond existing intermediate-verification + partial-correction literature. total_hits=7 >= 1 -> FAIL.
